title: papaver dubium var. pinnatifidum
intro: Papaver dubium var. pinnatifidum, also known as the pink poppy or California poppy, is a variety of the annual poppy plant that is characterized by its pinnatifid leaves and pink to purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Papaver dubium var. pinnatifidum include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and even act as an anticonvulsant. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
